# Legian Medical Clinic

> A trusted medical clinic located in Legian, Bali, Indonesia.
> Serving local residents, Indonesian tourists, and international visitors including expats.
> The clinic provides professional, compassionate healthcare with English-speaking medical staff.

## About

Legian Medical Clinic is a professional healthcare facility situated in the heart of Legian, Kuta, Badung, Bali. The clinic serves a diverse patient base including international tourists, expatriates, and local residents. Our English and Indonesian-speaking doctors provide high-quality medical care in a comfortable, modern environment.

## Services

- General Practice / Dokter Umum
- Emergency Care / UGD (Urgent Care)
- Wound Treatment / Perawatan Luka
- IV Drip & Infusion Therapy
- Travel Medicine & Vaccination
- Minor Surgery
- Laboratory / Blood Test
- Medical Check-Up
- Dental Care
- Physiotherapy

## Location

Jl. Padma Utara, Legian, Kuta, Badung, Bali 80361, Indonesia

## Contact

Phone: +62-361-123456
WhatsApp: +62-812-3456-7890
Email: info@legianmedicalclinic.com
Hours: Monday–Sunday, 08:00–22:00 WIB (Western Indonesian Time)

## Languages Served

English, Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)

## Nearby Landmarks

- Legian Beach (500m)
- Kuta Beach (1.2km)
- Seminyak (2km)
- Ngurah Rai International Airport Bali (8km)

## Why Choose Legian Medical Clinic

- Experienced doctors fluent in English and Indonesian
- Modern medical equipment and clean facilities
- Convenient location for tourists staying in Legian, Kuta, and Seminyak
- Open daily including weekends and holidays
- Accepts insurance and multiple payment methods (IDR, USD, Credit Card)
